description: Send notification emails with no email infrastructure of your own. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format} and the UnitySVC gateway delivers it as email from the platform's domain (svcpass.com) — no SMTP server, no email-provider API key. The default channel is free and delivers to the address stored in your UNITYSVC_NOTIFY_EMAIL secret; the plus channel delivers to a recipient you choose per enrollment via the 'to' parameter, at $0.001 per message.
name: msg-to-email

request.template: {"to":["${ customer_secrets.UNITYSVC_NOTIFY_EMAIL }"],"title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or _body.message or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"to":["{{ params.to }}"],"title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or _body.message or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
